results.title: What to know as cryptocurrency scams rise in Texas
results.description: Texans lost more than $1 billion to scams involving cryptocurrency in 2025, according to the FBI, second only to California in the amount siphoned away by fraudsters.

results.description: Global markets may remain volatile amid US-Iran developments and the Q1 FY27 earnings season. An ET analysis highlights five Refinitiv-screened stocks with improving scores, favourable analyst ratings and upside potential over 12 months.

results.title: CHS (NASDAQ:CHSCN) Shares Up 0.2% Following Dividend Announcement
results.description: CHS Inc. (NASDAQ:CHSCN – Get Free Report)’s stock price rose 0.2% during mid-day trading on Wednesday following a dividend announcement from the company. The company traded as high as $24.96 and last traded at $24.89. 61,429 shares traded hands during mid-day trading, an increase of 151% from the average daily volume of 24,495 shares. The [...]

results.title: Azam, Bintulu Port Holdings explore strategic partnership
results.description: KUCHING (July 11): Angkatan Zaman Mansang (Azam) Sarawak is strengthening its strategic network following a recent discussion with Bintulu Port Holdings Berhad (BPHB) to explore potential collaboration in strategic communication, human capital development, talent cultivation and high-impact community programmes across Sarawak. The meeting, held in Bintulu, served as a platform for both organisations to exchange [...] The post Azam, Bintulu Port Holdings explore strategic partnership appeared first on Borneo Post Online .

results.title: 'It's a race': House prices, rents rise as investors rush in ahead of deadline
results.description: Warrnambool median house prices hit $660,000, with rent at $600 weekly. Investors rush to buy before 2026 super fund changes take effect.

results.title: Crude oil posted a weekly gain of over 4%, snapping a four-week losing streak, metals showed mixed performance, LME aluminum dropped over 2%, and gold and silver posted weekly declines. [Overnight Market]
